action.reasoning: Observation: Current predict.py uses double pass MetricGAN+. The SNR test showed minimal improvement (-3.03 → -3.00 dB). Best PESQ so far is 3.134 from single-pass pretrained MetricGAN+. Analysis: I need to evaluate whether double pass helps PESQ. If it doesn't, I'll revert to single pass. With 7 iterations left, I should submit eval now to check. Decision: Submit eval with current double-pass predict.py.
